name: ミュージックドリーマーズ
original_name: ミュージックドリーマーズ
overview: A music programme presented by Mion Okada and Naru Koike (Platinum Boys)! Featuring special guest Shirinami Mizu, the artist everyone’s talking about!! We’ll be revealing exclusive details about tracks you rarely hear on other programmes, as well as some behind-the-scenes stories!
